content.content:
It appears that I am unable to send the email or create the calendar event at this moment due to certain restrictions. 

However, you have a scheduling conflict on May 19, 2024. You have a confirmed project kick-off meeting from 10:00 AM to 11:00 AM and a one-on-one meeting with your manager from 11:00 AM to 11:30 AM. 

Since your lunch at 12:00 PM would follow these meetings, you are free for lunch at that time. You can create the event manually or let me know if there's anything else I can do for you!
